% pandoc-template.tex — XeLaTeX template for the Hebrew project book.
%
% Implements the formatting requirements from docs/מחוון.pdf (§714916):
%   - Font: David CLM (Hebrew equivalent of "David" mentioned in the rubric)
%     at base size 12pt
%   - Header on every page: student name / project name
%   - Footer on every page: page number
%   - Auto-generated TOC (3 levels deep, matches H1/H2/H3 in markdown)
%   - RTL (Hebrew) primary, LTR (English) for code blocks and identifiers
%
% Activated via build-pdf.sh:  --template "$TEMPLATE"

\documentclass[12pt,a4paper,$if(documentclass)$$documentclass$$else$report$endif$]{$if(documentclass)$$documentclass$$else$report$endif$}

% ---- Geometry ---------------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage[margin=2.5cm]{geometry}

% ---- Hebrew + LTR support ---------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setdefaultlanguage{hebrew}
\setotherlanguage{english}

% Hebrew font — David CLM is the standard free David on Debian/Ubuntu
% (package fonts-culmus). Falls back to FreeSerif if David CLM unavailable.
\setmainfont[Script=Hebrew]{David CLM}
\setsansfont[Script=Hebrew]{David CLM}
\setmonofont{DejaVu Sans Mono}

% Latin font for code, identifiers, English citations
\newfontfamily\latinfont[Script=Latin]{DejaVu Sans}

\usepackage{bidi}

% ---- Header + Footer (rubric requirement) -----------------------------------
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
% Hebrew text in headers — flip with R for right-aligned on RTL pages
\fancyhead[R]{עוקב לייזר אוטונומי — אדם זבולון}
\fancyhead[L]{שאלון 714916}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% Plain pages (chapter openers) — still show page number, drop header
\fancypagestyle{plain}{
  \fancyhf{}
  \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
  \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
}

% ---- Line spacing -----------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{setspace}
\setstretch{1.3}

% ---- Hyperlinks -------------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage[hidelinks,bookmarks=true,bookmarksopen=true]{hyperref}
\usepackage{url}
\urlstyle{same}

% ---- Tables (longtable for cross-page tables) -------------------------------
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{array}

% ---- Math --------------------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}

% ---- Images ------------------------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{graphicx}
\graphicspath{{.}{../diagrams/rendered/}{../photos/}}

% Caption setup — center, smaller font
\usepackage{caption}
\captionsetup{font=small,labelfont=bf,justification=centering}

% ---- Code blocks -------------------------------------------------------------
% Pandoc emits highlight commands; we let it.
$if(highlighting-macros)$
$highlighting-macros$
$endif$

% ---- TOC depth ---------------------------------------------------------------
\setcounter{tocdepth}{3}
\setcounter{secnumdepth}{3}

% Hebrew TOC title
\addto\captionshebrew{\renewcommand{\contentsname}{תוכן עניינים}}

% ---- Document --------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{document}

$if(title)$
% Title page is in the markdown (00-cover.md) — no automatic titlepage here.
$endif$

$if(toc)$
\tableofcontents
\newpage
$endif$

$body$

\end{document}
